ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "mssubclass" INTEGER /* Type of dwelling involved in the sale */,
  "mszoning" TEXT /* General zoning classification */,
  "street" TEXT /* Type of road access to the property */,
  "alley" TEXT /* Type of alley access to the property */,
  "lotshape" TEXT /* General shape of the property */,
  "landcontour" TEXT /* Flatness of the property */,
  "utilities" TEXT /* Type of utilities available */,
  "lotconfig" TEXT /* Lot configuration */,
  "landslope" TEXT /* Slope of the property */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Physical locations within Ames city limits */,
  "condition1" TEXT /* Proximity to various conditions */,
  "condition2" TEXT /* Proximity to various conditions (if more than one is present) */,
  "bldgtype" TEXT /* Type of dwelling */,
  "housestyle" TEXT /* Style of the dwelling */,
  "overallqual" INTEGER /* Rates the overall material and finish of the house */,
  "overallcond" INTEGER /* Rates the overall condition of the house */,
  "saletype" TEXT /* Type of sale */,
  "salecondition" TEXT /* Condition of sale */,
  "parcel_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the property's parcel */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the property */,
  "square_footage" REAL /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "num_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "num_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the property's information was last updated */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the property was sold */,
  "listing_agent" TEXT /* Agent who listed the property */,
  "selling_agent" TEXT /* Agent who sold the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_neighborhood FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "interior_details" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "heating" TEXT /* Type of heating */,
  "heatingqc" TEXT /* Heating quality and condition */,
  "centralair" TEXT /* Central air conditioning */,
  "electrical" TEXT /* Electrical system */,
  "kitchenqual" TEXT /* Kitchen quality */,
  "functional" TEXT /* Home functionality (assumes typical) */,
  "fireplacequ" TEXT /* Fireplace quality */,
  "garagetype" TEXT /* Garage type */,
  "garagefinish" TEXT /* Interior finish of the garage */,
  "garagequal" TEXT /* Garage quality */,
  "garagecond" TEXT /* Garage condition */,
  "paveddrive" TEXT /* Paved driveway */,
  "poolqc" TEXT /* Pool quality */,
  "fence" TEXT /* Fence quality */,
  "miscfeature" TEXT /* Miscellaneous feature */,
  "flooring_type" TEXT /* Type of flooring */,
  "wall_type" TEXT /* Type of walls */,
  "ceiling_type" TEXT /* Type of ceiling */,
  "basement_finish" TEXT /* Type of finish in the basement */,
  "basement_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the basement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, analyst, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the user's office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user's email address has been verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the property data */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the property data */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the property data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the neighborhood is located */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average property price in the neighborhood */,
  "median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of properties in the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "school_district" TEXT /* School district in which the neighborhood is located */,
  "public_transportation" INTEGER /* Whether public transportation is available in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)
column_names: Type of dwelling involved in the sale
